name: Guns N' Roses
bio: Guns N' Roses remains one of the strongest hard-rock catalogs in streaming, with a handful of global evergreen tracks doing most of the economic work.
notable_for: Guns N' Roses remains closely associated with Sweet Child O' Mine and November Rain, which continue to anchor catalog attention.
career_highlight: Songs like Sweet Child O' Mine and November Rain still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Classic catalog streaming keeps major songs active well beyond the original release cycle.
Playlist longevity and generational rediscovery support steady long-tail listening.
Film, television, sports, and trailer usage can reactivate demand for familiar recordings.
